Name: Fable Uuid
Tagline: UUID generator supporting RFC 4122 v4 and configurable random strings
Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-fable-uuid-filled-light">
				<path d="M 24 2
		H 72
		Q 94 2 94 24
		V 72
		Q 94 94 72 94
		H 24
		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24
		Q 2 2 24 2 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 24 2
		H 72
		Q 94 2 94 24
		V 72
		Q 94 94 72 94
		H 24
		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24
		Q 2 2 24 2 Z" fill="#1093e9"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-fable-uuid-filled-light)"><defs><mask id="_cr_9051"><rect x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96" fill="#fff"/>
						<circle cx="63" cy="48" r="32" fill="#000"/></mask></defs>
					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="32" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" mask="url(#_cr_9051)"/>
					<circle cx="63" cy="48" r="26" fill="#e152ce" opacity="0.7"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="38" font-weight="700"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">FU</text>
	</svg>
